name: librust-inflector-dev
title: librust-inflector-dev
summary: Adds String based inflections for Rust - Rust source code
description:
Adds String based inflections for Rust - Rust source code
Snake, kebab, camel, sentence, class, title and table cases as well as
ordinalize, deordinalize, demodulize, foreign key, and pluralize/singularize
are supported as both traits and pure functions acting on String types.
.
This package contains the source for the Rust Inflector crate, packaged by
debcargo for use with cargo and dh-cargo.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use librust-inflector-dev because Adds String based inflections for Rust - Rust source code.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use librust-inflector-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair librust-inflector-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `librust-inflector-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
